---
title: "Discovery Quest: CS in Your Daily Life"
subtitle: "Uncover the Hidden Computer Science Behind Your Everyday Activities"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.quest-badge}
🔍 DISCOVERY QUEST | Difficulty: Beginner | Time: 2 minutes
:::

::: {.hero}
# 🌅 A Day Powered by Computer Science

From the moment you wake up to when you go to sleep, Computer Science is working behind the scenes. Let's discover how!
:::

## ⏰ Morning: 7:00 AM - Your Adventure Begins

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 📱 7:00 AM - Alarm & Notifications
Your phone's **operating system** manages apps, schedules alarms, and coordinates notifications—all running simultaneously!

**CS Concepts:** Multithreading, Time Management, Operating Systems
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### ☕ 7:30 AM - Smart Home
Your smart speaker understands "play music" using **natural language processing** and **speech recognition**!

**CS Concepts:** AI, Machine Learning, Voice Recognition
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🚗 8:00 AM - Navigation
Google Maps calculates the fastest route using **graph algorithms** analyzing real-time traffic from millions of phones!

**CS Concepts:** Graph Theory, Algorithms, Data Structures
:::

</div>

## 🏫 Midday: 12:00 PM - Connected & Learning

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 📸 12:00 PM - Social Media
That filter that puts cat ears on your head? **Computer vision** tracks 68 facial landmarks in real-time!

**CS Concepts:** Computer Vision, Image Processing, AR
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🍕 12:30 PM - Food Delivery
DoorDash optimizes delivery routes for multiple orders using **optimization algorithms** similar to the traveling salesman problem!

**CS Concepts:** Optimization, Logistics, Algorithms
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎮 1:00 PM - Gaming Break
Your game renders 60 frames per second, simulates physics, and runs enemy AI—all at once!

**CS Concepts:** Graphics, Physics Simulation, Game AI
:::

</div>

## 🌆 Evening: 6:00 PM - Entertainment & Connection

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎵 6:00 PM - Music Streaming
Spotify's Discover Weekly analyzes your listening history and compares it to millions of users to find perfect recommendations!

**CS Concepts:** Recommender Systems, Machine Learning, Big Data
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 📺 7:00 PM - Video Streaming
Netflix uses **compression algorithms** to send HD video without buffering, and **prediction algorithms** to suggest what to watch!

**CS Concepts:** Compression, Networking, ML Recommendations
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 💬 8:00 PM - Video Chat
FaceTime compresses video, manages network connections, and syncs audio—all in real-time with minimal delay!

**CS Concepts:** Video Compression, Networking, Real-time Systems
:::

</div>

## 🌙 Night: 10:00 PM - Security & Privacy

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🔒 Online Shopping
When you buy something online, **encryption** protects your credit card using complex mathematical algorithms!

**CS Concepts:** Cryptography, Security, Number Theory
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🏥 Health Tracking
Your fitness tracker analyzes heart rate patterns using **signal processing** to detect irregularities!

**CS Concepts:** Signal Processing, Data Analysis, ML
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🤖 Smart Suggestions
Your keyboard predicts the next word using **natural language models** trained on billions of sentences!

**CS Concepts:** NLP, Machine Learning, Probability
:::

</div>

## 🎯 The Invisible Infrastructure

Behind ALL of these apps are even more CS systems:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**🌐 The Internet Itself**

- **Networks** route data across continents in milliseconds
- **Protocols** ensure devices communicate reliably
- **Web servers** handle billions of requests per day
- **Databases** store and retrieve information lightning-fast
- **Cloud computing** provides power when and where it's needed
:::

## 💡 Every App is a CS Problem Solved

Think about any app on your phone. Computer Scientists had to solve:

- ✅ How to make it fast
- ✅ How to keep your data secure
- ✅ How to handle millions of users
- ✅ How to make it easy to use
- ✅ How to update it without breaking
- ✅ How to work on different devices
- ✅ How to use battery efficiently

## 🚀 You Use CS Every Day... Now You Can Create It!

Computer Science isn't just about using technology—it's about **building** the next generation of tools that will shape our world.

::: {.tip-box}
**🤔 Imagine This:**

What if you could:

- Build the next viral app?
- Create an AI that helps doctors diagnose diseases?
- Design a game that millions play?
- Solve a problem that frustrates you daily?

**That's what Computer Scientists do!**
:::

::: {.quest-complete}
### ✨ Discovery Quest Complete!

You've uncovered the hidden CS in your daily life. Now let's explore why studying CS at Allegheny could be your perfect path!

**Next Quest:** [Why Study CS? →](00-why-study-cs.qmd)
:::
